headline: Skyworks (SWKS) Down 4.6% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Rebound?
summary: Skyworks (SWKS) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: Soitec Secures Multi- Year Agreement to Supply POI Wafers for Skyworks’ Sky5 Platform
summary: Skyworks Solutions to use Soitec’s POI wafers Bernin (Grenoble), France, March 4, 2026 -- Soitec, a world leader in the design and manufacturing of innovative semiconductor materials, today announced a multi-year agreement to secure volume production of state-of-the-art Piezoelectric-On-Insulator (POI) wafers for Skyworks Solutions. This agreement extends the long-standing relationship between the companies and ensures a reliable, long-term wafer supply to support Skyworks’ future needs. Under t
